subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God and handmaidens of the All-Merciful! Praise be unto God that the guide of divine favor hath arrived, and the path once barred hath opened, the gates have been unlocked [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی و اماء رحمن الحمد لله بدرقه عنایت رسید و راه بسته باز شد ابواب گشوده گشت
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @war and peace, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @non-participation in politics
